channel.title: GitHub CMake Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of CMake in GitHub

item.title: cpm-cmake/CPM.cmake
item.description: 📦 CMake's missing package manager. A small CMake script for setup-free, cross-platform, reproducible dependency management.

item.title: corrosion-rs/corrosion
item.description: Marrying Rust and CMake - Easy Rust and C/C++ Integration!

item.title: esp-rs/esp-idf-template
item.description: A "Hello, world!" template of a Rust binary crate for the ESP-IDF framework.

item.title: bilke/cmake-modules
item.description: Additional CMake functionality. Most of the modules are from Ryan Pavlik (https://github.com/rpavlik/cmake-modules)

item.title: ecmwf/ecbuild
item.description: A CMake-based build system, consisting of a collection of CMake macros and functions that ease the managing of software build systems
